message:
Running command: # The script uses subprocess.run with cmd list — check how shutil.which and subprocess work
# The issue is that the subprocess inherits a different PATH from the script
# Let's check what the script's ensure_ipm_available returns vs what subprocess sees

python3 -c "
import shutil, subprocess
print('shutil.which:', shutil.which('ipm'))
res = subprocess.run(['which', 'ipm'], capture_output=True, text=True)
print('subprocess which:', res.stdout.strip())
res2 = subprocess.run(['/nc/apps/bin/ipm', '--version'], capture_output=True, text=True)
print('ipm version:', res2.stdout.strip(), res2.stderr.strip())
"
